title: Todo domain model and invariants
description: Implement the Todo bounded context in pure domain modules: aggregate/entity behavior, explicit domain errors, and invariants such as rejecting empty titles and invalid ids for mutating operations, with no imports from react, next, or persistence drivers.
acceptance: Todo aggregate (or equivalent) enforces MVP invariants for create/update/toggle/delete without framework or driver imports under the domain tree.
Domain errors distinguish invalid input, rule violations, and not-found style outcomes using ubiquitous language from the brief.
Unit tests cover happy paths and edge cases (empty title, invalid id) without a real database.
No react, next/*, or SQLite/driver imports appear in domain modules.
